basic_details.organization_name: CSIR-National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR-NIScPR)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR-NIScPR) has published the SPA Recruitment 2026 notification under Advertisement No. NIScPR/01/VI/2026-R&A on its official website https://niscpr.res.in/. The recruitment drive aims to fill 6 SPA positions on a contractual basis. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 40 years and holding a Master's/Integrated Master's degree in Natural, Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences, MVSc/ Animal Sciences, a Bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology/ Medicine, a Master's in Engineering/ Technology, or a Doctoral degree in S

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters /Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/ MVSc / Animal Sciences OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine. Masters /Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University OR Doctoral Degree in Science/ Pharma/MD/MS
qualification.details: Masters /Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/ MVSc / Animal Sciences OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent and 3 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services OR Masters /Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University OR Doctoral Degree in Science/ Pharma/MD/MS from a recognized University or equivalent and 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services

selection_process: Academic records Performance in the test Interview

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR-NIScPR SPA Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.csir_national_institute_of_science_commu: Masters /Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/ MVSc / Animal Sciences OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine. Masters /Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University OR Doctoral Degree in Science/ Pharma/MD/MS

content_sections.heading: CSIR-NIScPR SPA Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR-NIScPR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR-NIScPR SPA Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Masters /Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/ MVSc / Animal Sciences OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent and 3 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services OR Masters /Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University OR Doctoral Degree in Science/ Pharma/MD/MS from a recognized University or equivalent and 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per rule.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Academic records Performance in the test Interview

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR-NIScPR SPA Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for CSIR-National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR-NIScPR).

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is SPA.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for SPA posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies available for SPA posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for CSIR-NIScPR SPA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for SPA posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date for SPA posts is 16 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for SPA posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for SPA posts is 40 years, with age relaxation as per rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the SPA position?
faq.answer: The salary for the SPA position is Rs. 42000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. What are the essential qualifications for SPA posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Masters/Integrated Masters in relevant sciences or engineering, or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology/Medicine with experience, or a Doctoral Degree with experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for CSIR-NIScPR SPA posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves evaluating academic records, performance in a test, and an interview.
